name: reel_2026-05-26_001
caption:
Three weeks ago this cabinet was where things went to die.

Open the door, hold your breath, hope you don't knock anything over. Sponges from a Costco run. Three half-empty bottles of the same cleaner. A measuring cup I lost track of in 2023.

I added a Simple Houseware 2-tier chrome sliding basket. Holds 18 lbs per shelf. Sets directly on the cabinet floor — no installation.

Now everything has a row. The system tells me when I'm out of something because the slot is empty, not buried.

Comment LINK and I'll DM you the link.
Amazon affiliate — I earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.

#amazonhomefinds #kitchenorganization #smallspacesolutions #undersinkstorage

affiliate.primary_product: Simple Houseware 2-Tier Sliding Basket Organizer (chrome, under-sink)

hook: Three weeks ago this cabinet was where things went to die.

name: reel_2026-05-26_002
caption:
Picture this: it is 4am, your neck won't turn left, and the alarm is in 90 minutes.

You stare at the ceiling. Your shoulder is numb. The pillow under your head is somehow both too high and too low. You flip it. Cold side, sure, but the angle is still wrong.

An adjustable side sleeper pillow with a shoulder cutout fixes the angle problem. Eli & Elm — latex-fiber fill you can add or remove, U-shape that lets your shoulder rest naturally.

Same bed, same room, same body. The only thing that changed was the pillow. The 4am stare-at-the-ceiling routine just stopped.

Comment PILLOW and I'll DM you the link.
Affiliate link — I earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.

#amazonhomefinds #sleepbetter #sidesleeper #bedroomupgrade

affiliate.primary_product: Eli & Elm Side Sleeper Pillow (U-shape, latex, queen)

hook: Picture this: it is 4am, your neck won't turn left, and the alarm is in 90 minutes.

name: reel_2026-05-26_003
caption:
I had four years of bottles falling on my feet every morning.

The cabinet under the kitchen sink was the place things went to die. Sponges, dish soap, an entire bottle of expensive olive oil I forgot I owned. Every morning I reached for paper towels and knocked over six things.

I got a Simple Houseware 2-tier sliding basket — chrome wire, holds 18 lbs per shelf, and the front rack slides out independently of the back.

Now I see everything. Sliding the front out doesn't disturb the back row. Haven't dropped a bottle in three weeks.

Amazon affiliate — I earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.

#amazonhomefinds #kitchenorganization #smallspacesolutions #undersinkstorage

hook: I had four years of bottles falling on my feet every morning.

name: reel_2026-05-28_002
caption:
Buying more containers will never fix your under-sink cabinet.

I tried clear bins. I tried stackable trays. I tried labeling everything. None of it solved the actual problem — that anything past the front 6 inches is functionally lost.

What worked was a Simple Houseware 2-tier sliding basket. Chrome wire, 18 lbs per shelf, and the front rack slides independently to expose the back.

I threw out two bins of duplicate cleaners I'd bought because I forgot the first ones existed. The cabinet finally works.

Comment LINK and I'll DM you the link.
Amazon affiliate — I earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.

#amazonhomefinds #kitchenorganization #smallspacesolutions #undersinkstorage

affiliate.primary_product: Simple Houseware 2-Tier Sliding Basket Organizer (chrome, under-sink)

hook: Buying more containers will never fix your under-sink cabinet.

name: reel_2026-05-28_003
caption:
Most pillows are designed for back sleepers. 74% of us sleep on our sides.

Standard pillows put your spine at a 30 degree angle when you sleep on your side. That's why you wake up feeling like someone twisted your neck while you were out.

A side sleeper pillow keeps your spine straight. Eli & Elm uses a U-shape with a shoulder cutout and adjustable latex-fiber fill so you can dial in the height for your shoulder width.

Spine stays straight all night. Wake up the same way you fell asleep — relaxed, not crooked.

Comment PILLOW and I'll DM you the link.
Affiliate link — I earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.

#amazonhomefinds #sleepbetter #sidesleeper #bedroomupgrade

name: reel_2026-05-29_002
caption:
I avoided opening this cabinet for two whole years.

Every time I opened it I had to do a Tetris move just to grab dish soap. The wasted vertical space mocked me. There was room for two of everything if I could just get to it.

The Simple Houseware 2-tier sliding basket fixed it in 4 minutes — no tools, no drilling, just sets on the cabinet floor. Each tier slides independently.

Doubled my usable storage without buying a single new container. The cabinet went from chaos to a system in one afternoon.
